# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next'

// Default values for API keys and database URLs
const DEFAULT_API_KEY = 'vercel_default_key_789';
const DEFAULT_DB_URL = 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

// Read configuration from process.env.EDGE_CONFIG
const API_KEY = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG?.API_KEY || DEFAULT_API_KEY;
const DB_URL = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG?.DB_URL || DEFAULT_DB_URL;
const FEATURE_FLAG = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG?.FEATURE_FLAG || 'false';

interface Data {
  apiKey: string;
  dbUrl: string;
  featureFlag: boolean;
}

function handler(req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse<Data>) {
  res.status(200).json({
    apiKey: API_KEY,
    dbUrl: DB_URL,
    featureFlag: JSON.parse(FEATURE_FLAG),
  });
}

export default handler;
